summary: Iteration 43 - Consulenza Rapida AI Triage feature testing complete. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. The feature allows users to describe their situation in Italian, receive 1-3 AI-powered procedure suggestions with explanations, refine with follow-up questions, and start practices directly from suggestions.

details: Returns AI-powered procedure suggestions (1-3) with explanations
ConsulenzaRapidaPage shows input phase with description textarea
Submit button 'Analizza la mia situazione' present
Suggestion cards with confidence badges (Alta/Possibile corrispondenza)
'Avvia questa procedura' buttons present on each suggestion
GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key working correctly
AI returns structured JSON with type, message, suggestions
Suggestions include practice_id, name, category, why, confidence, next_step_hint
AI validates suggested practice_ids against catalog

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing catalog procedures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified the Consulenza Rapida AI Triage feature. Key verified: (1) POST /api/consulenza/triage accepts description, returns AI suggestions with session_id. (2) POST /api/consulenza/refine accepts session_id + follow_up for refinement. (3) GET /api/consulenza/sessions returns user's consultation history. (4) Frontend ConsulenzaRapidaPage has input phase (textarea, submit) and results phase (conversation, suggestion cards, follow-up). (5) Suggestion cards show confidence badges and 'Avvia questa procedura' buttons. (6) Navigation works from sidebar and dashboard quick actions. (7) 'Avvia questa procedura' correctly navigates to /practices/new?type=PROCEDURE_ID. (8) AI integration uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key (NOT MOCKED - real integration).
